p2pPeers.description: P2P peers connected (doesn't include WebSeed peers)

resolutionChanges.description: How many resolution changes occurred since the last metric creation

bufferStalled.description: How many times buffer has been stalled since the last metric creation

errors.description: How many errors occurred since the last metric creation

downloadedBytesP2P.description: How many bytes were downloaded with P2P since the last metric creation

downloadedBytesHTTP.description: How many bytes were downloaded with HTTP since the last metric creation

uploadedBytesP2P.description: How many bytes were uploaded with P2P since the last metric creation
